name: C/p Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the brown sugar to the butter and continue creaming until fluffy.
3. Add the applesauce and mix well.
4. Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, ground cloves, nutmeg (if using), and allspice (if using).
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the mixture, mixing until just combined.
6. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
7. Pour the cake mixture into wide-mouth canning jars that are specially tempered for baking.
8. Grease the inside of each jar well. Optionally, line the bottom with waxed paper.
9. Cover each jar tightly with foil, greased side down.
10. Place the jars in a crockpot or large pot with a crockery liner and cook on high heat for 2 3/4 to 3 hours, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean and the cakes spring back when touched.
11. Remove the jars from the crockpot and let cool for 10 minutes.
12. Turn off the heat and unmold the cakes, removing any waxed paper if used.
13. Serve warm or at room temperature with whipped topping, if desired.
